evidence_spans.span: 第一版删掉非必填项，完成率从42%到51%
第二版合并地址栏，完成率到59%；第三版拆开错误提示，完成率到64%
今天想压掉一个字段，把目标推到68%，请给改法

abstain_reason: Legal convergence exclusion: the form is being directly iterated, each prior step reports measurable improvement on completion rate, and the listed changes use mixed mechanisms rather than three prior same-means repairs with same-class recurrence.
